SEARCH
Package Business.Shops

Class Shop

java.lang.Object
Business.Shops.Shop
Direct Known Subclasses:
ShopLoyalty, ShopMaxBenefit, ShopSponsored
public abstract class Shop extends Object
The `Shop` class represents a shop in the shopping center with basic information and functions. It is an abstract class that serves as a base for specific shop implementations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected String
    businessModel
    The business model to which the shop belongs.
    protected ArrayList<SpecificProduct>
    catalogue
    The list of products in the shop's catalog.
    protected float
    earnings
    The accumulated earnings of the shop.

  • Field Details

    • earnings

      protected float earnings
      The accumulated earnings of the shop. This attribute is used to modify the earnings of the different kinds of shops.

    • businessModel

      protected String businessModel
      The business model to which the shop belongs.

    • catalogue

      protected ArrayList<SpecificProduct> catalogue
      The list of products in the shop's catalog.

  • Constructor Details

    • Shop

      public Shop(String name, String description, int year, String model)
      Constructor to initialize all the attributes of a shop object.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the shop.
      description - The brief description of the shop.
      year - The founding year of the shop.
      model - The business model to which the shop belongs.

    • Shop

      public Shop(String name, String businessModel, String productName, String productBrand, float productPrice)
      Constructor to initialize a shop with a product in its catalog.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the shop.
      businessModel - The business model of the shop.
      productName - The name of the product.
      productBrand - The brand of the product.
      productPrice - The price of the product.

    • Shop

      public Shop(String shopName)
      Constructor to initialize a shop with a specified name.
      Parameters:
      shopName - The name of the shop.

    • getName

      public float getIncome()
      Gets the accumulated earnings of the shop.

      The accumulated earnings of the shop.

    • getCatalogue

      public ArrayList<SpecificProduct> getCatalogue()
      Gets the catalog of the shop, which contains a list of products.
      Returns:
      The catalog of the shop.

    • setCatalogue

      public void setCatalogue(ArrayList<SpecificProduct> catalogue)
      Sets the catalog of the shop.
      Parameters:
      catalogue - The list of products to set in the catalog.

    • setIncome

      public void setIncome(float income)
      Sets the accumulated earnings of the shop.
      Parameters:
      income - The earnings to set for the shop.

    • getModel

      public String getModel()
      Gets the business model of the shop.
      Returns:
      The business model of the shop.

    • getCatalogueNames

      public ArrayList<String> getCatalogueNames()
      Gets the names of all products in the shop's catalog.
      Returns:
      ArrayList containing the names of all products in the shop's catalog.
